segments.text: No, two purples—the tipper got it to the side!
segments.original_text: いや、紫2つ、先端で当たった横に

segments.text: Yeah, this Pikmin throw is really solid for line recovery
segments.original_text: いやー、このピクミン投げですとね、ライン回復としてはかなり優秀で

segments.text: and it's definitely an option the Pikmin player wants to land
segments.original_text: ピクミン側としてもかなり通したい択ではあるので

full_text: No, two purples—the tipper got it to the side! Yeah, this Pikmin throw is really solid for line recovery and it's definitely an option the Pikmin player wants to land
